name: Low Profile
description: When a unit with the Low Pro/f_ile keyword would roll 1 or more defense dice during the Roll Cover Pool step, it rolls 1 fewer defense die and instead adds an additional d result to the Cover Pool after rolling.
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Low Pro/f_ile keyword would roll 1 or more defense dice during the Roll Cover Pool step, it rolls 1 fewer defense die and instead adds an additional d result to the Cover Pool after rolling.
